cards.name: Prathama
cards.rewards: Milestone Reward Points via AU Rewardz on shopping, dining, movies, bill payments & everyday spends; 1% fuel surcharge waiver (max Rs.100/month)
cards.lounge: Complimentary domestic airport lounge on Rs.20,000 spend per calendar quarter (AU program default)

cards.name: Altura
cards.rewards: 2% cashback on grocery, departmental store & utility spends (max Rs.50/cycle); 1% on other retail (max Rs.50/cycle); +Rs.50 cashback on min Rs.10,000 retail/cycle; fuel excluded
cards.lounge: 2 complimentary railway lounge visits per calendar quarter; complimentary domestic airport lounge on Rs.20,000/quarter spend
cards.welcome_benefit: Introductory 5% cashback on min Rs.2,500 retail spend within first 60 days (max Rs.150/cycle)

cards.name: NOMO
cards.rewards: 2 Reward Points per Rs.100 retail (1 RP = Rs.0.25); quarterly bonus 500 RP at Rs.25,000 spend, doubles at Rs.50,000; 1% fuel surcharge waiver (max Rs.100)
cards.lounge: 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per quarter on Rs.50,000 spend in prior quarter (w.e.f. 10-Apr-2026)
cards.welcome_benefit: 500 Reward Points on first transaction within 30 days of setup
cards.enrich_source: https://www.au.bank.in/personal-banking/credit-cards/nomo-credit-card (FD-backed/secured card; forex 0.99%; card_type corrected to secured 2026-07-01)

cards.name: Xcite
cards.rewards: 1.5% cashback on POS retail; 2X Reward Points on online card usage
cards.lounge: 8 railway lounge visits/year (max 2/quarter); complimentary domestic airport lounge on Rs.20,000/quarter spend
cards.welcome_benefit: 10,000 bonus Reward Points on spending Rs.1 lakh within 60 days of issuance

cards.name: SPONT
cards.rewards: 1% cashback on all eCommerce, POS, contactless & UPI (cap Rs.500/cycle; excl fuel, rent, govt & education, cash, EMI, insurance); never-expiring coins on UPI; 1% fuel surcharge waiver
cards.lounge: 2 railway lounge visits/quarter; 2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits/quarter on Rs.50,000/quarter spend
cards.enrich_source: https://www.au.bank.in/personal-banking/credit-cards/au-spont-credit-card ; SoC: Joining Rs.299 / Renewal Rs.199 (fee corrected 2026-07-01 from the jumbled two-column MITC parse)

cards.name: Altura Plus
cards.rewards: 2 Reward Points per Rs.100 on all online transactions; 1 RP/Rs.100 on utility, telecom & insurance; 500 bonus RP on Rs.20,000+ monthly spend; 1% fuel surcharge waiver
cards.lounge: 2 complimentary railway lounge visits per calendar quarter; complimentary domestic airport lounge on Rs.20,000/quarter spend
cards.welcome_benefit: Welcome vouchers worth Rs.500 on min Rs.10,000 retail spend within 60 days

cards.name: Tejas
cards.rewards: Accelerated reward points on eligible spends; 500 bonus RP on 5+ transactions/cycle; partner cashback (movies, grocery, food delivery, cabs, bill payments); fuel surcharge waiver
cards.lounge: Complimentary domestic airport lounge on Rs.20,000/quarter spend (AU default)
cards.welcome_benefit: Bonus reward points or curated brand voucher on card activation

cards.name: Xcite Ultra
cards.rewards: 1 Reward Point per Rs.100 on utility & telecom (max 100 RP/txn); 1% fuel surcharge waiver (Rs.400-5,000, max Rs.150/cycle)
cards.lounge: 8 railway lounge visits/year (max 2/quarter); complimentary domestic airport lounge on Rs.20,000/quarter spend
cards.welcome_benefit: 10,000 bonus Reward Points on spending Rs.1 lakh within 60 days

cards.name: Xcite ACE
cards.rewards: Up to Rs.76 extra cashback on contactless; +Rs.50 cashback on min Rs.10,000 retail/cycle
cards.lounge: 8 railway lounge visits/year (max 2/quarter); complimentary domestic airport lounge on Rs.20,000/quarter spend

cards.name: Lakshya
cards.rewards: Up to 5 Reward Points per Rs.100 on Grocery, Departmental Stores & Contactless; 1 RP/Rs.100 on Insurance, Utility & Telecom; 15% off at partner merchants; monthly BOGO movie tickets; fuel surcharge waiver
cards.lounge: 8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits/year (max 2/quarter)
cards.welcome_benefit: Brand vouchers worth Rs.1,000 or 4,000 Reward Points on activation & first transaction within 30 days

cards.name: Ananta
cards.rewards: Up to 5 Reward Points per Rs.100 on shopping, dining & travel; up to 50,000 RP in a card-anniversary year
cards.lounge: Complimentary domestic airport lounge on Rs.20,000/quarter spend (AU default)

cards.badge: Up to 5X rewards with 15% instant discounts

cards.name: Vetta
cards.rewards: Up to 4 Reward Points per Rs.100; 500 bonus RP on Rs.50,000/quarter and 1,000 bonus RP on Rs.1 lakh/quarter retail spend; 1,000 bonus RP on a birthday transaction
cards.lounge: 1 complimentary domestic + 1 international airport lounge access per quarter, plus railway lounge access
cards.welcome_benefit: 10,000 bonus Reward Points on Rs.1 lakh spend within first 60 days; complimentary annual Times Prime membership

cards.name: Zenith Plus
cards.rewards: Up to 2 Reward Points per Rs.100 on dining, travel & international; 1,000 bonus RP on min Rs.75,000 retail spend/cycle; 1 RP = Rs.1
cards.lounge: 4 complimentary domestic + 4 international airport lounge visits per quarter (Priority Pass)
cards.welcome_benefit: Luxury brand vouchers worth Rs.5,000 on card activation (or equivalent Reward Points)

cards.name: Zenith
cards.rewards: 2 Reward Points per Rs.100 on travel, dining & international; 1 RP/Rs.100 other; 1 RP = Rs.1
cards.lounge: 8 domestic (2/quarter) + 8 international (2/quarter) lounge visits/year via Priority Pass; from 10-Apr-2026 domestic needs Rs.50,000 prior-quarter spend
cards.welcome_benefit: Welcome benefit worth Rs.5,000 on activation (luxury voucher or Reward Points)

cards.name: Business Cashback
cards.rewards: 1% cashback on spends (credited on full Total Amount Due repayment); GST payment enabled; business insurance cover (cash-in-transit, fire & burglary, public liability, air accident)

cards.name: CheQ
cards.rewards: 12% reward points on top brands (flights, hotels, utilities), 5% on other online shopping/travel/food/grocery, 2.5% on CheQ UPI, 1% elsewhere; 2 points = Rs.1 on CheQ Travel; fuel surcharge waiver
cards.lounge: 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits on Rs.20,000/quarter spend
cards.welcome_benefit: Virtual card issued instantly on approval

cards.name: CheQ LED
cards.rewards: 12% reward points on top brands (flights, hotels, utilities), 5% on other online shopping/travel/food/grocery, 2.5% on CheQ UPI, 1% elsewhere; 2 points = Rs.1 on CheQ Travel; fuel surcharge waiver
cards.lounge: 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits on Rs.20,000/quarter spend
cards.welcome_benefit: Virtual card instantly on approval; India's first LED card that lights up on every transaction

cards.name: Traverse (NRI)
cards.rewards: 4 Reward Points per Rs.100 on international spends; fuel surcharge waiver up to Rs.250/month (fuel/EMI/cash/rent/education/govt excluded)
cards.lounge: Priority Pass membership; 2 complimentary domestic + international lounge visits per quarter (USD 35 + GST beyond complimentary)

cards.name: LIT
cards.rewards: 1 Reward Point per Rs.100 retail (base); customizable add-on features e.g. up to 5% cashback (max Rs.1,000/30 days) on selected categories by paying a feature fee

cards.name: InstaPay
cards.rewards: 1% cashback on UPI transactions across Departmental Stores, Dining, Pharmacy, Grocery & Supermarkets (cap Rs.100/cycle)
cards.lounge: Complimentary domestic airport lounge on Rs.20,000/quarter spend (AU default)

cards.name: KOSMO
cards.rewards: Kiwi Rewards on UPI Scan & Pay (via Kiwi app), Ecom, POS & contactless (excl cash, rent, education/govt, insurance, EMI, fuel, BBPS); 1% fuel surcharge waiver. Exact per-Rs.100 rate not stated on AU pages

cards.name: ixigo
cards.rewards: 1 Reward Point per Rs.200 (online, offline & CC-on-UPI); bonus at Rs.75,000 quarterly spend; 1 RP = 25 paise (50 paise on ixigo money); zero forex markup
cards.lounge: 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits on Rs.20,000/quarter spend; Priority Pass on request (1,000+ intl lounges)
cards.welcome_benefit: Rs.1,000 ixigo money + 1,000 Reward Points on first transaction within 30 days
cards.enrich_source: https://www.ixigo.com/travel-credit-card (co-brand partner page; zero forex markup confirmed 2026-07-01, corrected from the 3.49% bank default since ixigo wasn't enumerated in the MITC's forex table)

cards.name: Paytm
cards.enrich_source: No AU or Paytm official credit-card product page found after checking both aubank.in/au.bank.in and paytm.com (Paytm appears only as a bill-pay aggregator/merchant offer, not a co-branded card). Left needs_review in Supabase pending further investigation, not excluded.
